Table Purpose: Controls search preferences for attractions, immersive venues, museums, simulations, hands-on experiences, shows, and family activities.
Search Focus: immersive, fantasy themed, sci-fi, classic rock, hands-on family fun, unusual museums, maker experiences
Include Terms: escape rooms; simulators; trains; gem mining; themed cafes; music history; dinner shows
Exclude Terms: generic arcades; ordinary malls; chain venues
Region Notes: Orange County first, then LA, Temecula, San Diego
Search Notes: Prefer wow-factor group experiences that feel worth driving for.

Table Purpose: Controls search preferences for destination-worthy dining, immersive restaurants, themed bars, dinner theater, and unique culinary experiences.
Search Focus: theatrical dining, fantasy themed, sci-fi bars, immersive restaurants, unforgettable presentation
Include Terms: tasting menu; hidden bar; themed dining; dinner theater; rooftop views; live music dining
Exclude Terms: ordinary brunch; standard steakhouses; generic chains
Region Notes: Orange County first, then LA, Temecula, San Diego
Search Notes: Look for places comparable in memorability to Barton G or Pan Am-style concepts.

Table Purpose: Controls search preferences for outdoor places, scenic drives, hikes, waterfalls, caves, overlooks, tide pools, gardens, and geological oddities.
Search Focus: waterfalls, caves, scenic overlooks, tide pools, hidden gardens, kid-friendly hikes, unusual geology
Include Terms: slot canyon; red rock; boardwalk; preserve; train ride; wildlife; bloom
Exclude Terms: generic neighborhood parks; plain walking paths
Region Notes: Orange County first, then LA, Temecula, San Diego
Search Notes: Bias toward high-payoff scenery, novelty, and family usefulness.

Table Purpose: Controls search preferences for time-bound events happening in the next 30 days, including festivals, pop-ups, seasonal runs, and limited experiences.
Search Focus: pop-ups, immersive events, family festivals, concerts, seasonal experiences, limited-run food and art events
Include Terms: spring festival; themed night; lanterns; family fair; museum event; limited menu; live show
Exclude Terms: expired listings; recurring generic farmers markets
Region Notes: Orange County first, then LA, Temecula, San Diego
Search Notes: Only include events that are verifiably active within the next 30 days.
